name: Prayers of Gratitude
description: Cultivate a thankful heart through intentional prayers of thanksgiving.

prayers.title: Thank God for His faithfulness
prayers.description: Reflect on how God has been faithful in your life and give thanks.

prayers.title: Thank God for provision
prayers.description: Thank Him for food, shelter, work, and daily needs.

prayers.title: Thank God for relationships
prayers.description: Express gratitude for the people God has placed in your life.

prayers.title: Thank God for answered prayers
prayers.description: Look back at prayers God has answered and praise Him.

prayers.title: Thank God for nature
prayers.description: Praise God for the beauty of His creation around you.

prayers.title: Thank God in difficulties
prayers.description: Choose to give thanks even in the hard seasons, trusting His purpose.
